name: Trading Strategy Workflow
description: Automated trading workflow that processes strategy files, performs backtesting analysis, adjusts based on P&L, and executes position trades

config.prompt: Parse and validate the trading strategy from the input file: {{input.strategyFile}}. Extract key parameters including entry signals, exit signals, position size, and risk management rules.

Conduct backtesting analysis on the strategy: {{output.strategy}}. Analyze historical performance, calculate win rate, drawdown, Sharpe ratio, and other key metrics. Provide detailed backtesting report.

nodes.customName: Analyze and Adjust Based on P&L

config.prompt: Analyze the backtesting results: {{output.backtest}}. Identify profit and loss patterns, calculate required adjustments to strategy parameters (position size, stop loss, take profit levels). Recommend optimization changes.
Based on the optimized strategy: {{output.adjustments}}, prepare and execute the trading position. Generate trade execution plan with entry price, position size, stop loss, and take profit levels.
